title: Malfunctioning ACs in Heatwave! Patients Suffer in Malkangiri District Hospital - Kanak News Odisha

full_text:
As Odisha sizzles under a brutal heatwave, the Malkangiri District Headquarters Hospital (DHH)—an institution that has received the 'Kayakalp Award' three times—is failing its patients in the most basic way.
While the administration celebrates awards, the ground reality is that more than half of the AC units in the hospital are defunct. Patients already struggling with heat-related illnesses are being forced to endure the suffocating heat inside the wards because the hospital authorities and the PWD department cannot seem to coordinate the installation of new units, despite having the necessary funds.
